messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
give me table with diff green colors (in hex value)

Sure! Here's a table with different shades of green colors represented in hexadecimal values:

| Shade     | Hex Value |
|-----------|-----------|
| Lime      | #00FF00   |
| Forest    | #228B22   |
| Olive     | #808000   |
| Chartreuse| #7FFF00   |
| Sea Green | #2E8B57   |
| Mint      | #98FF98   |
| Emerald   | #50C878   |
| Grass     | #66FF00   |
| Fern      | #71BC78   |
| Shamrock  | #45CEA2   |

I hope you find this table helpful!
